headline: Truist Upgrades Datadog (DDOG) to Buy from Neutral
summary: Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG) is one of the 8 Best Generative AI Software Stocks to Buy in June 2026. On June 15, Truist analyst Miller Jump upgraded Datadog’s rating to Buy from Hold while raising its price target to $300 from $190, according to a report by Investing.com. The analyst attributed the upgraded rating and price target […]
